---
title: "About Me"
---

## Background

I'm **Your Name**, a final-year Data Science student at *Your University*, Dublin. Growing up with a curiosity for how systems work, I discovered a love for data and the stories it tells. Over the past three years I have developed strong foundations in statistical analysis, machine learning, and software development.

Before university, I completed a Higher Certificate in Computing which gave me practical exposure to databases and programming fundamentals. Since then, I have built on this by working on real-world datasets and contributing to collaborative projects.

::: {.callout-tip}
## Fun Fact
I once built a model that predicted Dublin Bus delays better than the official app — purely out of frustration! 🚌
:::

---

## Education

| Degree | Institution | Year |
|---|---|---|
| BSc Data Science & Analytics | Your University | 2022 – 2025 |
| Higher Certificate in Computing | Your College | 2020 – 2022 |

---

## Technical Skills

::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Languages & Tools**

<span class="skill-badge">Python</span>
<span class="skill-badge">R</span>
<span class="skill-badge">SQL</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Git</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Quarto</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Bash</span>

:::
::: {.column width="50%"}
**Libraries & Frameworks**

<span class="skill-badge">Pandas</span>
<span class="skill-badge">NumPy</span>
<span class="skill-badge">scikit-learn</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Plotly</span>
<span class="skill-badge">Matplotlib</span>
<span class="skill-badge">spaCy</span>
:::
:::

---

## Goals

My near-term goal is to secure a graduate role as a **Data Analyst or Junior Data Scientist** where I can work on impactful, data-driven products. Longer term, I am interested in specialising in **natural language processing** and **applied ML research**.

I am also passionate about **open-source contribution** and plan to publish several of my university projects publicly on GitHub after graduation.

::: {.callout-note}
## Open to Opportunities
I am actively seeking graduate positions starting **Summer 2025**. If you think I'd be a good fit for your team, please [get in touch](contact.qmd)!
:::

---

## Interests & Hobbies

Beyond data science, I enjoy:

- 📚 Reading about philosophy of mind and cognitive science
- 🏃 Running — completed the Dublin City Marathon 2024
- ♟️ Chess (currently rated ~1500 on Lichess)
- 🎵 Playing guitar (badly, but enthusiastically)

---

> *"The goal is to turn data into information, and information into insight."*
> — Carly Fiorina [^1]

[^1]: Often quoted in data science communities to emphasise the value of meaningful interpretation over raw numbers.
